name: the firewall holds a general-tagged fact inside a health note and files a promotion review
description: docs/ANALYSIS.md: domain ratchets up, never down without review. A health-domain note also mentions a non-clinical fact the model tags `general` (a gym membership). ratchet_domain(extracted=general, note_domain=health) returns (health, needs_promotion=True): the firewall KEEPS the fact in the note's domain (health, no leak) and files a domain_promotion review proposing the move so a human can let it out. This pins the asymmetric 'out is a leak' bias and the review the pipeline files for it.

steps.body: At the cardiac rehab visit Dr. Okafor told me to keep up the gym — I joined Summit Fitness last month.
